mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the federal funds rate raises discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions that trigger risk-off positioning, depressing S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite the negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous contraction in residential construction starts and a decline in consumer credit outstanding indicate synchronized demand weakness, forecasting negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive when both proxies decline concurrently over a 3-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: An expanding industrial production index reflects resilient manufacturing output that supports corporate earnings, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days during supply-constrained environments.
failure_condition: INDPRO expansion coincides with negative SPX 20d returns in > 60% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above the 310 index threshold forces prolonged restrictive monetary policy, compressing equity multiples and yielding negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are positive when CPIAUCSL remains above 310 for consecutive quarters.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly growth in real GDP directly expands aggregate corporate revenues, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as earnings expectations adjust upward.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth shows no predictive power for 5d SPX returns over a 5-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent payroll growth and a stable unemployment rate confirm labor market resilience, reducing recession risk premiums and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint payroll gains and stable unemployment fail to generate positive SPX 20d returns in > 50% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts exceeding 1.2 million units signal robust consumer confidence and construction activity, boosting forward equity returns over the next 60 trading days specifically during low-rate environments.
failure_condition: HOUST remains above 1200 while SPX 60d returns are negative in > 60% of instances.
